constraints.expression:
execution_status is null
    or execution_status in ('planning', 'in_work', 'paused', 'finished')
client_vat_bps is null or (client_vat_bps >= 0 and client_vat_bps <= 10000)
markup_bps is null or (markup_bps >= 0 and markup_bps <= 10000)
discount_bps_override is null or (discount_bps_override >= 0 and discount_bps_override <= 10000)

policies.name: estimate_versions_select
policies.using:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.project_estimates pe
    where pe.id = estimate_id
      and public.can_access_project(pe.project_id)
  )

policies.name: estimate_versions_insert
policies.withCheck:
created_by = auth.uid()
  and exists (
    select 1
    from public.project_estimates pe
    where pe.id = estimate_id
      and public.can_write_project_content(pe.project_id)
  )

policies.name: estimate_versions_update
policies.using:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.project_estimates pe
    where pe.id = estimate_id
      and public.can_write_project_content(pe.project_id)
  )
policies.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.project_estimates pe
    where pe.id = estimate_id
      and public.can_write_project_content(pe.project_id)
  )

policies.name: estimate_versions_delete
policies.using:
exists (

      and public.can_write_project_content(pe.project_id)
  )

policies.name: estimate_works_insert
policies.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.estimate_versions ev
    join public.project_estimates pe
      on pe.id = ev.estimate_id
    where ev.id = estimate_version_id
      and public.can_write_project_content(pe.project_id)
  )

policies.using:

      on pe.id = ev.estimate_id

      and public.can_access_project(pe.project_id)
      and public.can_view_sensitive_detail(pe.project_id)
  )

policies.name: estimate_resource_lines_insert
policies.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1
    from public.estimate_works ew
    join public.estimate_versions ev
      on ev.id = ew.estimate_version_id
    join public.project_estimates pe
      on pe.id = ev.estimate_id
    where ew.id = estimate_work_id
      and public.can_write_project_content(pe.project_id)
  )
